ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weekly_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekly data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the year */,
  "week_start" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "cases_vaxxed" REAL /* Number of cases among vaccinated individuals */,
  "cases_unvaxxed" REAL /* Number of cases among unvaccinated individuals */,
  "hosp_vaxxed" REAL /* Number of hospitalizations among vaccinated individuals */,
  "hosp_unvaxxed" REAL /* Number of hospitalizations among unvaccinated individuals */,
  "total_cases" REAL /* Total number of cases */,
  "total_hospitalizations" REAL /* Total number of hospitalizations */,
  "cases_vaxxed_rate" REAL /* Rate of cases among vaccinated individuals */,
  "cases_unvaxxed_rate" REAL /* Rate of cases among unvaccinated individuals */,
  "hosp_vaxxed_rate" REAL /* Rate of hospitalizations among vaccinated individuals */,
  "hosp_unvaxxed_rate" REAL /* Rate of hospitalizations among unvaccinated individuals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the vaccination data was collected */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccination data was collected */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Number of doses administered */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status (e.g., fully vaccinated, partially vaccinated) */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "doses_administered_first" INTEGER /* Number of first doses administered */,
  "doses_administered_second" INTEGER /* Number of second doses administered */,
  "doses_administered_booster" INTEGER /* Number of booster doses administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_data" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the hospitalization data was collected */,
  "hospitalization_date" TEXT /* Date the hospitalization data was collected */,
  "length_of_stay" INTEGER /* Length of stay in the hospital */,
  "hospitalization_status" TEXT /* Hospitalization status (e.g., recovered, deceased) */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Admission date */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Discharge date */,
  "icu_admission" INTEGER /* Whether the patient was admitted to the ICU */,
  "ventilator_use" INTEGER /* Whether the patient required ventilator support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, public health official) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weekly_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "visualization_config" TEXT /* Configuration of the visualization (e.g., chart type, colors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the report */,
  "report_config" TEXT /* Configuration of the report (e.g., layout, formatting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data update, new report) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
